identity.mission: Create a high-performance, industrial-grade CRM for MuscleGrid that eschews generic SaaS aesthetics for a bold, 'Performance Pro' interface.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix industrial ruggedness with fintech precision.
Data Density: Maximized for pros. No fluff. Every pixel works.
Contrast is King: High visibility for warehouse/TV environments.
Context-Aware: TV mode is distinct from Desktop mode.

primary.name: Electric Blue
primary.usage: Primary actions, active states, key data points

headings.usage: Page titles, KPI numbers, TV mode headers

body.usage: Table data, form labels, general text

mono.usage: Ticket IDs, Serial Numbers, SKU codes

custom_components.name: StatCard
custom_components.description: High-contrast metric card with trend indicator. Supports 'TV Mode' variant with massive text.

custom_components.name: TicketTable
custom_components.description: Dense data table with status badges and quick actions. Uses Shadcn Table.

custom_components.name: StatusBadge
custom_components.description: Pill-shaped badge with solid colors for high visibility.

custom_components.name: TVDashboardGrid
custom_components.description: Auto-refreshing, high-contrast grid layout for large screens.

styling_rules: Buttons: Sharp corners or small radius (rounded-md). No pills for primary actions.
Cards: Flat with 1px border (border-slate-200). Subtle shadow-sm.
Inputs: High contrast borders for visibility in warehouse lighting.
TV Mode: White text on Black background. Font size 2x normal.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation (fixed), Top header (search/user), Main content area (scrollable).

tv_mode.structure: Full screen, no sidebar, auto-refresh progress bar at top.

assets.icons: Lucide React (Standard set: Truck, Box, Users, BarChart2, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Clock)

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup the routing and role-based access control skeleton first.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Implement the 'Auth' pages with the industrial background image.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build the 'Sidebar' and 'Layout' components. Use the 'Performance Pro' color scheme.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the 'Dispatcher TV Mode' as a separate, distraction-free route (/dispatcher/tv).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure all forms (Ticket Creation, Warranty) use Shadcn Form with Zod validation.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, keep it solid and clean.
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA compliant).
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give that industrial feel.
TV Mode must have a 'Dark Mode' toggle or be dark by default for contrast.
